transactions.desc: The Twins released Topa on Saturday, Aaron Gleeman of AaronGleeman.com reports.
The Cardinals added Fernandez to their active roster to serve as the 27th man for Saturday's doubleheader against the Reds.
The Diamondbacks selected Troy's contract from Triple-A Reno on Saturday.
The Reds optioned Franco to Triple-A Louisville on Saturday.
The Reds optioned Phillips to Triple-A Louisville on Saturday.
The Reds recalled Maxwell from Triple-A Louisville on Saturday.
The Reds reinstated Ferguson (oblique) from the injured list Saturday.
The Reds added Petty to the active roster as the 27th man for Saturday's doubleheader against the Cardinals.
The Rangers claimed Crim off waivers from the Rockies on Saturday and optioned him to Triple-A Round Rock.
Pintaro was recalled from Triple-A Syracuse on Saturday.
Thornton was optioned to Triple-A Syracuse on Saturday.
Leasure was recalled from Triple-A Charlotte on Saturday.
The Cubs designated Lopez for assignment Saturday.
The Cubs recalled Alcantara from Triple-A Iowa on Saturday.
The Twins designated Garcia for assignment Saturday.
The Twins reinstated Bradley (pectoral) from the injured list Saturday.
Taylor retired from professional baseball Friday, Bill Shaikin of the Los Angeles Times reports.
The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Andrew Baker to the Colorado Rockies.
The Rockies recalled Thompson from Triple-A Albuquerque on Friday, Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.
The Tigers recalled Hanifee from Triple-A Toledo on Friday.
The Angels selected Meckler's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake on Friday.
The Angels optioned Lowe to Triple-A Salt Lake on Friday.
The Angels selected Walton's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake on Friday.
The Yankees activated Caballero (finger) from the 10-day injured list Friday.
The Yankees activated Cole (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Friday.
The Guardians optioned Heuer to Triple-A Columbus on Friday.
The Guardians activated Pallette from the paternity list Friday.
The Royals designated Diaz for assignment Friday.
The Royals recalled Tolbert from Triple-A Omaha on Friday.
The Mets designated Kimbrel for assignment Friday.
